updates.title: SAP User Experience Updates in 1H 2026
updates.summary: Several enhancements to the SAP user experience are now available in all systems, including updated navigation components, new Admin Center tools, and improved accessibility features.

updates.title: People Analytics: Story Reports Supports Cross-Domain Joins
updates.summary: Story Reports in People Analytics now supports cross-domain data joins, allowing HR analysts to combine Recruiting, Performance, and Employee Central data in a single report without exporting to external tools.

updates.title: Release Center Adds What's New to Admin Center
updates.summary: SAP SuccessFactors releases new features every six months. The Release Center in Admin Center now surfaces What's New content directly, making it easier for administrators to review upcoming changes.

updates.title: Succession & Development: Talent Intelligence Hub Updates
updates.summary: Talent Intelligence Hub now provides AI-driven successor readiness scoring, incorporating performance ratings, development activities, and competency assessments for a holistic succession view.

updates.title: Recruiting: AI-Assisted Job Description Generation
updates.summary: Recruiters can now use Joule to generate and refine job descriptions directly within Recruiting Management. The AI model suggests role responsibilities, qualifications, and inclusive language adjustments.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: AI-Powered Candidate Ranking in Recruiting
updates.summary: Workday 2026R1 introduces AI-powered candidate ranking that scores applicants based on job requirements, historical hiring patterns, and skills data, helping recruiters prioritize the most relevant candidates.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: Dynamic Skills Ontology Updates
updates.summary: The Skills Cloud in Workday now automatically updates its skills ontology based on market signals, ensuring that skill definitions and adjacencies stay current as roles and industries evolve.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: Compensation Review Collaborative Workflows
updates.summary: Compensation review cycles now support parallel manager approval workflows, allowing multiple managers to review compensation simultaneously. Includes conflict resolution rules and audit trail improvements.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: Learning Content Recommendations via Workday AI
updates.summary: Workday AI now powers personalized learning content recommendations based on an employee's role, career goals, skills gaps, and past learning behavior, surfacing relevant courses directly in the employee home page.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: Performance Journal Enhancements
updates.summary: Performance Journal now integrates with Slack and Microsoft Teams, allowing employees to log achievements and feedback directly from their preferred communication tools without switching to Workday.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: Absence Management Global Expansion
updates.summary: Workday Absence Management adds native compliance rules for 12 new countries including Taiwan, Thailand, and Vietnam, reducing the need for custom configuration for APAC deployments.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: People Analytics – Predictive Attrition Model
updates.summary: Workday People Analytics now includes a pre-built predictive attrition model that identifies at-risk employees using signals such as engagement scores, tenure, role changes, and compensation competitiveness.

updates.title: Workday 2026R1: Payroll Connect API Expansion
updates.summary: Payroll Connect REST APIs now expose gross-to-net calculation endpoints and payroll input staging, enabling deeper integration with third-party payroll providers and custom pre-payroll validation logic.

updates.title: Onboarding: Improved New Hire Dashboard Experience
updates.summary: The new hire dashboard in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding now supports custom welcome tiles, task grouping by category, and direct manager introduction cards to improve the day-one experience.

updates.title: Compensation: Flexible Budget Distribution Enhancements
updates.summary: Compensation planners can now apply multiple budget distribution rules within a single compensation cycle, including budget carry-forward across organizational units and improved off-cycle support.

updates.title: Performance Preparation Agent: Summarize Detailed 360 Report
updates.summary: Joule's Performance Preparation Agent now supports summarizing the Detailed 360 Report for direct reports, offering insights tailored to managers' queries. Also supports up to five attachments when creating activities.

updates.title: Employee Central: Position Management Enhancements
updates.summary: Position Management now supports bulk position creation via import, improved position hierarchy visualization, and real-time headcount budget alerts when positions are filled or vacated.

updates.title: Learning: Enhanced External Content Integration via xAPI
updates.summary: SAP SuccessFactors Learning now supports broader xAPI (Tin Can) statement types, enabling richer tracking of external learning activities such as on-the-job training, video completions, and social learning.
